class.name: PlayFabEntityData
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.entity_data[/code]. This service wraps client-safe PlayFab entity object and file APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: abort_file_uploads_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFDataAbortFileUploads[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: delete_files_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFDataDeleteFiles[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: finalize_file_uploads_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFDataFinalizeFileUploads[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_files_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFDataGetFiles[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_objects_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFDataGetObjects[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: initiate_file_uploads_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFDataInitiateFileUploads[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: set_objects_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFDataSetObjects[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.
